name: PT PP Presisi Tbk
summary: PT PP Presisi Tbk operates as an integrated heavy equipment-based construction company in Indonesia. It provides integrated services, including civil works, ready mix, foundation, formwork, erector, and mining, as well as equipment rental services. The company's civil works include the construction of ports, airports, railroads, coastal safeguards, irrigation channels or canals, dams, tunnels, building structures, roads, bridges, swamp reclamations, pipe installations, drillings, and land clearing. It is also involved in the provision of mechanical-electrical works, transportation/logistic, and trading services. In addition, the company possesses 2,650 heavy equipment consisting of 2515 large scale fleet (mobile), such as excavators, dump and mixer trucks, bulldozers, rollers, loaders and graders, concrete pavers, asphalt mixers and finishers, stone crushers, mobile concreate pumps, cement deep mixing and kapal keruks, cold planners and road reclaimers, and other heavy equipment. Further, it provides large scale fleet (non-mobile) comprising tower and crawler cranes, bored piles, passenger hoists, batching plants, and launcher girders. The company was formerly known as PT PP Peralatan Konstruksi and changed its name to PT PP Presisi Tbk in March 2017. PT PP Presisi Tbk was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in East Jakarta, Indonesia. PT PP Presisi Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Pembangunan Perumahan (Persero) Tbk.
